phases.name: fetch_and_audit
steps: context7: pull saasfly README + package.json feature list
diff saasfly vs existing base-template/scripture-streak to identify additive features

phases.name: extract_components
steps: extract auth scaffold (NextAuth or Clerk config)
extract dashboard shell (sidebar, nav, settings page)

phases.name: merge_into_factory
steps: merge extracted components into app factory base-template
update APP_FACTORY_CENTRAL_INDEX.md with new template capabilities
update ONBOARDING_PLAYBOOK.md with saasfly scaffolding steps

phases.name: generate_first_app
steps: scaffold one new niche SaaS app using updated template
wire Stripe payment link via payment_integrator.py --wire-app
deploy to Vercel, add URL to OPS/DEPLOYMENT_URLS.md
